lessons.observation: Unhandled KeyError: 'content' when reading live_triggers.json — add input validation and fallback in bridge_live_triggers().
Input validation and fallback for live_triggers.json 'content' KeyError implemented. Prevents system halt during signal bridge.
Cold start BTC allocation floor (90%) effectively limits drawdown risk during strategy validation phase. vs_hodl -0.4575% reflects only bootstrap fees, no alpha trades yet.

notes: Cold start: No strategies retired. One strategy created from approved hypothesis hch_20260524_001. Backtest indicated curve fit warning due to limited historical sample matching daily RSI < 30 + FGI = 25 + price > EMA200 by 5%+.
